reviews.review_title: how I became obsessed w/ vr
reviews.review_description: before I start the story this app did help me learn the basics of vr so very helpful. NOW, story time :3. I was just bored walking around the house when I decided to look in our secret room where we store some seasonal stuff. I was shuffling around when I saw my VERY VERY old quest 2. That thing used to be a family vr but we just stopped playing it because we had better things to do ig. So I picked up the quest 2, put it on my head with the controllers in my hand but it was dead which took me an embarrassing bit to realize. but thankfully the charger was also there so i wouldn’t have to buy a complete brand spankin new one. after its charging process i turned it back on to see that I couldn’t use it until I logged back into the account. imma skip the how I got logged in to save yall some reading. Imma tell you rn… this was the most fun I had had in a while. I was having fun on epic roller coasters, convinced my parents to let me get gorilla tag and rec room. Which made vr even MORE fun. i even made my first vr friend that i met at school 😃. They depressingly don’t get on anymore but we still talk. going forward about a few months i saw that meta made a new headset called the “meta quest 3” i did need a bit of an upgrade after all. So on Christmas day i finally got it and am still having a grand time with my irl friends to this day. Fin. *aka the end*

reviews.review_title: Getting better today and tomorrow is yes
reviews.review_description: Can't wait tomorrow morning but also my brain is so intrigued by this. Know what I mean by that.👌🧬🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🏆⚔️🪬🔓🔒 mine 😂😂

Since it is updated, no controllers only hands. I'm so mad that every time there is an update everything changes, maybe ok for the younger generation but not for some of the older people that doesn't understand.

reviews.review_title: Meta made an old lady very happy 🤠
reviews.review_description: My Meta Q3 arrived a few days ago. Once charged, it took mere minutes to work everything out. I always was a big fan of VR, I adorned planets in Active Worlds back in the day and still have my Oculus Rift from years ago...but this ~ {insert maniacal laughter} oh my! Just spectacularly well done. Buy yourself a perpetual gift, get a Meta Q3.

I purchased the Fly app, great app for the short time i had it. I had to factory reset my 2 week old meta quest 3. It claims any purchased games and paid stuff would not be lost, but downloads would be gone. Not true. So now i wont buy anything because if it needs another factory reset you loose everything. Im pretty limited to what i can do with this $800 entertainment device now.
People are saying the 3s doesn't work... I learned it in an hour
The quest 3s is ￼ awesome I ￼ love it 😍￼￼
I REALLY enjoy the VR interaction. I bought my system as a gift for my granddaughter, but I enjoyed it so much that I just kept it for myself. But I DID get her one as well.

Without Launchpad any app from this I can’t see Universal menu in VR.
No uninstall option. Default getting all users data ON mode. 

Ohhh OMG

reviews.review_title: You will get no help from meta
reviews.review_description: I learned this the hard way .I have asked multiple times for help we're deleting images from gallery on their cloud service. all you get is an automated response telling you it gets deleted after 90 days .That's hogwash .Meta does not care about their consumer because they don't care about the issues they have, they just want the money

Meta Quest Guide will not update and the update notification will not go away. Numerous reviews here are verifying this is a problem. The internet has plenty of people having this problem and they are not finding a solution. It is sad that one of the richest corporations on planet earth won’t fix this problem for their customers who paid a lot of money for this device.
This thing is totally frustrating

The Meta Quest 2 is an amazing device. Many apps you can use for free. I signed up for the annual subscription so I get to enjoy two new games every month. I don't get these negative reviews, I guess some people are just no good at operating tech gadgets 😅
